item.title: White House agrees to CLARITY Act ethics wording, improving prospects for US crypto market structure legislation
US regulators miss GENIUS Act's July 18 deadline, issuing 10 proposed stablecoin rules instead of final regulations
Tether's USDT faces a two-year compliance deadline under the GENIUS Act to retain access to US crypto platforms
EU revises MiCA framework after July 1 deadline; fewer than 230 of 3,000+ crypto-asset service providers hold authorization
DTCC launches pilot tokenized securities trades this month ahead of October platform rollout with 50+ institutional firms
Morgan Stanley secures preliminary OCC approval for a digital-asset trust bank to bring crypto custody and staking in-house
JPMorgan files to launch a new tokenized fund as Wall Street tokenization competition accelerates
Q2 2026 recorded 83 crypto security incidents totaling $755 million in losses, the highest quarterly total on record
Ostium lost $18 million in an oracle manipulation attack that exploited its own price-feed automation system on July 15
BIS warns fragmented stablecoin rules risk financial instability after stablecoin inflows moved three-month T-bill yields by $3.5 billion
US and UK jointly recommend aligned regulatory standards for stablecoins and tokenized assets, calling for private-sector testing
Australia's travel rule took effect July 1, requiring identity verification on all regulated exchange transfers regardless of amount
EU reviewing potential removal of MiCA's ban on stablecoin interest payments as part of a broader rulebook overhaul
SEC signals readiness to begin crypto rulemaking before the Senate votes on the CLARITY Act
North Korea-linked actors accounted for 76% of global crypto theft losses through April 2026, up from 64% in 2025
